subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath attained unto the splendours of the Sun when it shone forth from the most exalted Horizon, from the Lord of Names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز بانوار الشمس اذ اشرقت من الافق الاعلی من لدن مالک الاسما
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
